dialogos.texto_en: (It's usual for guys to change more quickly,\n so they'll probably end up waiting for others, but...)
They're so slow...
It usually takes this long\nfor a woman to change clothes.\nIf you're impatient, girls won't like you, you know?
Whoa?!\nWhen did you get here?
I just arrived.
Raiha-chan, your swimsuit is so cute!\nIt looks great on you!
Ehehe, thank you, Yotsuba-san.
We're back, Futaro-kun.
...Uh, no, I wasn't waiting at all.
That's not what you said earlier.
Hey, Futaro-kun.\nHow does my swimsuit look?\nDoes it fit properly? Is it cute?
I-it's...cute, yeah?
Hey?\nCould you guys stop leaving us out of the conversation.\nWe're all here together, you know.
Sometimes I forget that Ichika and Futaro\nare on this trip with us.
W-we didn't forget, you know!
Alright, now that we're all together,\nlet's go swimming!\nI feel like diving into the sea, right now!
But before that, let us hear your thoughts on our swimsuits.\nWe went through a lot of trouble to choose \nwhat to wear today.
Futaro, what do you think?
Well... I think everyone looks great.
You're looking away.\nCan't you look more carefully?
W-what do you want me to say?!
Alright, you two, that's enough.\nCome on, Ichika is right here with us.
Well, I don't mind, you know?\nAs loooong as you praise me too.
Well that's easy...
You're different from Fu-kun.
Gnnhh...
Umm, shall we go swimming soon?
Ah, wait, wait!
Normally, swimming would be nice,\nbut since we're at a seaside resort,\nlet's do some activities instead!
I agree!\nThere are a lot of things to do here,\nlike banana boating and parasailing.
Uesugi-san, do you have any preferences?
Me?\nLet's see%p-2;――
Banana boating!
Huh?
I think we should try banana boating first.\nWhat do you think, Futaro-kun?
Uh, yeah.\nThat sounds good.
I've never done banana boating before!\nThey pull you with a speedboat, right?\nIt seems pretty fast.
Yes, it's a little scary.
Don't worry, don't worry!\nFor you, Itsuki, I think the thrill of the speed\nwill become addictive.
Okay, it's settled.\nLet's go sign up for it right away!
There are two kind of boats: for pairs,\nor for groups.\nWhat shall we do?
Of course, go as a group%p-2;――
Excuse me!\nI want to ride with Futaro-kun,\njust the two of us!
Huh?
Futaro-kun, you'd like to ride with me, right?
Ah, well, I guess so.
It's good you're being honest.\nSo, I'll be riding with Futaro-kun.
Well, it's up to you.
Yes.
We got permission, so let's go!
Hey, wait a minute!\nDon't pull me!
Ooohh...\nI'm a little surprised...
I was surprised too.\nIt's rare to see Ichika act so excited.
Not that I have any complaints about their relationship,\nbut to be so bold, you know?
I feel a little left out.
Ahaha...\nBut they're dating,\nso this is normal, isn't it?
Actually, I think big bro\nshould take the lead more, though.
That might be difficult for Futaro.
I'm looking forward to it, Futaro-kun.\nI wonder how fast we'll go?
Well, it's probably not that fast, eh?\nHahahaha!
Hey, aren't you really nervous?\nYour voice sounds stiff?
I'm not!
Whoa?!
Eeeep!! It's so fast!!
Whoaaaaaa?! Are you serious?!\nBanana boats are really this fast?!
Ahahaha!\nStop panicking, Futaro-kun!
N-no, I never expected it to be this fast%p-2;――\n%p;Wait, that was close?! WOAH, we just got air!\nWe were floating just now, right?!
That's what makes it fun!
F-for sure, this rush\nand floating sensation isn't bad!
See! That's the way!
I'm getting all excited!\nHahahaha!
I know!\nI feel like I want to shout at the top of my lungs!
YODEL-AY-HEE-HOOOO...!
Huh? That's something you say in the mountains.
It's pretty much the same thing, right?\nYou should try shouting too,\nit's more refreshing than you think!
In that case%p-2;――
Futaro-kuuun!! I love youuu!!
Wai—?! What are you saying?!
Futaro-kuuun! I love you so muuuch!!
C-come on!\nWhat the hell are you saying!\nAre you stupid? Are you really stupid?!
I'm not stupid.\nI'm just telling the truth.
You can't say that in public!!
It's okay.\nNo one's listening here.
(Th-this girl!\n Did the adrenaline make her go nuts?!)
Come on, you too, Futaro-kun!
(Did I really just say that?!)
HUUURRYYY UUUP!
I-Ichika, I-I love you...
What?\nIf you don't say it loudly, I can't hear you.
WOOAAAH! I'm going all out!\nI did it, didn't I!
Ichikaaa!! I love youuu!!
I love you too, Futaro-kun!!\nI love you more than anyone in the world!
*sigh* That was so much fun!\nWe screamed so much, didn't we?
Y-yeah.
Huh? Futaro-kun,\nwhy do you look so down?\nWere you that scared?
Yeah, I was scared.\nScared of myself\nfor getting into such an inexplicable mood.
No way... \nI can't believe I acted like such an idiot...!
Geez, how many times\nare you gonna call yourself an idiot?
I was happy, you know?\nYou told me you loved me so much.
Hey, you can tell me more, you know?\nI...want to say it more too.
...Just when I thought they came back,\nwhat's he wriggling about?
Big bro, you're being creepy.
Uesugi-san? What's wrong?\nWere you that scared of the banana boat?
Ichika.\nWhat did you do?
Hmm? Nothing much.\nFutaro-kun, you're just so bold, aren't you!\nMy goodness!
Futaro?
Fu-kun?
Hey!\nDon't say it like that, Ichika!
What did you do?
Well, um...
I see, it's something you guys can't tell us.
Ahahaha! Hang in there, Futaro-kun!
Stop laughing and help me!!
